uploadDescription: Choose one or more local images to convert in your browser.
chooseImagesLabel: Drag and drop images here, or click to upload
uploadHint: Files stay on this device and are decoded locally.
supportedFormatsLabel: Supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, SVG, WebP, AVIF, and other browser-readable images.
optionsDescription: Tune AVIF quality, encoder speed, and output size before export.
qualityDescription: Higher quality preserves more detail and usually creates larger files.
scaleDescription: Resize the output from 10% to 400% of the original dimensions.
speedDescription: Lower values spend more time searching for smaller files; higher values finish faster.
losslessDescription: Preserve exact pixel values when size is less important than fidelity.
resultDescription: Preview converted files and download individual images or a batch ZIP.
emptyResultDescription: Upload images and run conversion to see AVIF previews here.
invalidFileTypeError: Select a valid image file to continue.
noFilesError: Upload at least one image before converting.
invalidImageError: The image could not be read. Try a different file.
canvasUnavailableError: Canvas is not available in this browser.
workerUnsupportedError: This browser does not support the worker needed for AVIF encoding.
conversionFailedError: Failed to convert the image. Please try again.
partialConversionError: Some files could not be converted.
zipFailedError: The images converted, but creating the ZIP failed. Download files individually.
